name: Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England: A Comprehensive Machine Learning Benchmark with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators

description: arXiv:2606.20918v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Accurate short-term electricity demand forecasting is critical for reliable power system operation, energy market planning, and infrastructure optimization. This paper benchmarks ten machine learning models for daily electricity demand forecasting across the New England ISO (February 2020 - March 2023). The models span four families: tab...
author: Reza Ghanavati, Behrooz Mosallaei
